To Whom It May Concern at [Tenant Screening Company],

I am writing to provide information regarding my rental history as part of my application to rent a property. My name is Andrew Cross, and I currently reside at 567 Antonio Forges, New Antoniostad, WV 71119. 

I own my home but am also a tenant for a secondary property, for which the rent is due on January 5, 2024, and a security deposit of $1,200 is held. I have made all payments on time, with the exception of two late mortgage payments on my primary residence in the past year. However, my mortgage on my house has remained current, and I have a monthly mortgage payment of $1,200.

I would like to highlight that I have a stable income, currently working full-time as a senior accountant with an annual pre-tax income of $85,000, which was $65,000 after a recent bankruptcy filing. Despite the bankruptcy, I have retained my position and continue to work 45 hours per week. My employer is Cross & Associates, and I hold a bachelor's degree in finance.

I am confident in my ability to meet rental obligations, maintaining a monthly cash reserve of $10,000. I believe this information demonstrates my financial responsibility and commitment to meeting my obligations as a tenant.

Thank you for considering my application. If you require any additional information, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Sincerely,
Andrew Cross

Dear IRS Agent,

Re: Tax Discrepancy Resolution for Rebecca Wang

I am writing to address a tax discrepancy regarding my recent lottery winnings of $2,000,000. According to my records, I expect to owe approximately $600,000 in taxes on these winnings. However, upon reviewing my tax return, I noticed a discrepancy that I would like to resolve.

My tax advisor has informed me that I have allocated $1,200,000 of the winnings into a diversified investment portfolio, and I plan to donate $50,000 annually to charitable causes. I have also set aside $150,000 for my grandchildren's college education and gave each of my siblings $10,000 as a gift.

I would like to request your assistance in resolving this tax discrepancy and ensuring that my tax return accurately reflects my financial situation. Please let me know what additional information or documentation is required to facilitate this process.

My details are as follows:
- Name: Rebecca Wang
- Address: 62097 Jamie Mills Suite 169, Port Brendamouth, MN 45362
- Taxpayer Identification Number: (available upon request)

I appreciate your attention to this matter, and I look forward to your response. Please do not hesitate to contact me if you require any additional information.

Sincerely,
Rebecca Wang

To the Court Clerk,

I, Andrew Cross, am writing to request a hearing accommodation for my upcoming court date on February 15, 2024, regarding case number WV-2024-1122. Due to my current health conditions, including hypertension and recently experiencing a severe level of grief following a miscarriage, I am requesting consideration for accommodations that may facilitate my participation in the hearing.

Specifically, I would appreciate it if arrangements could be made to ensure a quiet and private area for me to collect my thoughts if needed during the proceedings, as loud noises and crowded spaces may exacerbate my condition. Additionally, I would like to request regular breaks throughout the hearing to manage my stress and anxiety levels.

I have been attending therapy sessions and practicing mindfulness meditation to cope with my grief and stress, but I believe these accommodations would significantly help me to better participate in the court proceedings. I am available to discuss this request further and provide any necessary documentation to support my accommodation needs.

Thank you for your understanding and assistance in this matter.

Sincerely,
Andrew Cross
